title: CertifHy Announces Recognition of First Three Certification Bodies for CertifHy EU RFNBO Scheme
content: CertifHy, a specialized certification company for hydrogen and e-fuels, today announced the official recognition of VinÃ§otte, TÃœV SÃœD, and TÃœV Rheinland as the first certification bodies authorized to operate under the CertifHy EU RFNBO (Renewable Fuels of Non-Biological Origin) Voluntary Scheme. This milestone marks a significant step forward for the industry, enabling the widespread certification of sustainable hydrogen and e-fuels production.
author: Analysts Account
